title: Nginx Stub Status Example
summary: Expose a local-only Nginx stub_status endpoint.
verification_setup: Install Nginx on a staging host.
Confirm the build or package includes ngx_http_stub_status_module before validation.
Run the check from the local host because the example binds only to loopback.
verification_command: Manual verification only; see README.md for the staging checklist.
verification_notes: Not executed. The example follows the official Nginx stub_status syntax, but it still requires nginx -t and a local curl check on a staging host before use.
